title: pelargonium × electum
intro: Pelargonium × hortorum, also known as zonal geranium, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Pelargonium genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and relieving coughs due to its high content of rosmarinic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pelargonium × hortorum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate cold and flu symptoms, as well as to support immune function.
